---
title: "Scientific machine learning, carefully"
description: "Mathematical derivations, computational experiments, and critical notes on learning for scientific problems."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 9
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-kicker}
AN APPLIED MATHEMATICS BLOG
:::

# Models, equations, and what can go wrong

Notes on scientific machine learning, numerical analysis, inverse problems, optimization, and the mathematical structure connecting them.

[Read the latest notes](#latest-notes){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [About the author](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::

## Latest notes {#latest-notes}

Each post aims to state a precise question, develop the minimum mathematical setup, and connect theory with a reproducible computation.
